title: Sayayo Shelf Bracket Corner Brace Angle Bracket Shelf Support Wall Hanging 150mm*125mm, Metal Bright White Finished, 4 Pcs, EJR150W-4P
features: One-piece Structure - By adopting whole shaped technology, the product has the characteristic of high intensity and durability.
Minimalist Design - L-shaped bracket without diagonal brace can increase space and bring neat visual comfort.
High Quality - These shelf supporter are made of solid high quality iron that possess good hardness and high strength, not easy to bend.
Impressive Surface - Bright white color surface, comfortable touch feelings. High-temperature spray painting process ensures quality and longevity in wet weather and presents an elegant appearance.
Dimension - 150 x 125 x 20mm/6" x 5" x 0.8" (L*W*H); Mount Hole Dia.: 5mm/ 0.2"
description: Product Description SERIES OF PRODUCTS - White : Unique bright white finished makes it stand out from surroundings. - Black : Fine high-end appearance, suitable for different kinds of decoration style. - Brushed : Not easy to scratch, look bright as new after long time use. STRUCTURE One-piece Style By adopting whole shaped technology, the product has the characteristic of high intensity and durability. Rounded Corner Design Safe and don't scratch your hands. HIGH QUALITY Nice Material These shelf supporter are made of solid high quality iron that possess good hardness and high strength,not easy to bend. High Temperature Spray Paint Process lt ensures the quality and longevity in humid weatherand the appearance is elegant.
